diagrams.title: System Bus Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how CPU, memory, and I/O devices are connected through address, data, and control buses
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how the three buses work together for data transfer between components

diagrams.title: Bus Arbitration Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the decision process when multiple devices request bus access
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how bus conflicts are resolved and which device gains access

diagrams.title: Synchronous Bus Timing Diagram
diagrams.description: Timing diagram showing how data transfer occurs in a synchronous bus with clock cycles
diagrams.purpose: Understanding timing relationships and wait state insertion in synchronous transfers
